title: cyperus dives
intro: Cyperus dives, also known as dark sedge or umbrella sedge, is a perennial aquatic or wetland plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cyperus dives include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Cyperus dives can be made into a tea, tincture, or poultice to harness its medicinal properties.
